summary_en: Cost of capital and share price-conscious management initiative. Board resolution on current-state analysis and future policy direction and key measures. Detailed response framework in attachment.
title_en: Response to Realize Management Conscious of Cost of Capital and Share Price
translation_en_brief: On 14 May 2026, Tanaka Seimitsu Kogyo held a board meeting to address the realization of management conscious of cost of capital and share price. The company issued a notice announcing that the board has resolved on future policy direction and key measures based on current-state analysis. The detailed response framework is provided in an attached document titled 'Response to Realize Management Conscious of Cost of Capital and Share Price'. No specific numerical targets, timelines, or implementation methods are disclosed in the press release header; full details are reserved for the attachment.
